title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
subTitle: Major Vihaan Singh Shergill of the Indian Army leads a covert operation against a group of militants who attacked a base in Uri, Kashmir, in 2016 and killed many soldiers.

title: Akshara
subTitle: A girl from a poor family joins a reputed college but falls into the trap of the college chairman and is sent to jail.

title: Bagheera
subTitle: A psycho killer creates an application to kill women who get a complaint about cheating on their man. However, his life changes when he meets a psychology student.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Maaligai
subTitle: A female police officer goes to an ancient palace to investigate. However, once she enters the palace, she gets a vision of her past life where she was a fierce and beautiful princess.
